title: Playbook Configuration
description: Schema for playbook-config.json — the agent-level Playbook configuration file. Created by 'instar playbook init', lives at .instar/playbook/playbook-config.json.

engine_version.description: Playbook engine version this config was created for. Used by 'instar playbook upgrade' to detect drift.

paths.description: Relative paths within the playbook root directory.

python.description: Python runtime configuration. Set by 'instar playbook init'.

backend.description: Storage backend. Filesystem is default; SQLite available for high-volume agents.

governance_overrides.description: Per-agent overrides for governance policy defaults.

trusted_mount_roots.description: Absolute paths that are allowed as mount sources. Empty = no trusted roots (every mount requires --trust flag).

user_identity_source.description: How user identity is determined for multi-tenant namespacing.

user_id.description: Explicit user ID when user_identity_source is 'config'.

keystore.description: HMAC key storage backend. Auto-detected by 'instar playbook init' based on platform.

root.description: Playbook root directory relative to project root.

governance.description: Governance policy filename within playbook root.

history.description: Append-only history filename within playbook root.

interpreter.description: Path to the Python interpreter (typically the venv python).

venv_path.description: Path to the Python virtual environment.

hmac_chain.description: PROTECTION toggle: Enable HMAC-SHA256 integrity chain on history. Disabling removes integrity verification.

pii_screening.description: PROTECTION toggle: Enable PII pattern screening on delta payloads and mounts. Disabling allows PII into manifest.

semantic_dedup.description: CAPABILITY toggle: Enable semantic deduplication using embeddings. Requires additional dependencies.

decay.description: CAPABILITY toggle: Enable time-based relevance decay on items.

source_session_pattern.description: Regex pattern for validating source_session IDs. Dawn uses '^AUT-\\d+-wo$'. Default accepts any.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum reflector confidence for auto-processing. Below this routes to pending_review.

rate_limit_per_session.description: Maximum deltas per session per lifecycle run.

max_inline_tokens.description: Maximum tokens for inline content per item.
